hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run python ci/hooks/check_forbidden_commands.py
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run python ci/hooks/lint-on-save.py
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run python ci/hooks/check-on-start.py
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run python ci/hooks/check-on-stop.py
